response.justification: While the candidate has over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and a commendable entrepreneurial background, the resume does not demonstrate the Director-level scope or deep, recognized AI expertise required for this Principal role. His recent AI exposure is highly tactical, lacking the strategic advisory and enterprise cloud transformation leadership the position demands.
strengths: Meets the 15+ years of software engineering experience requirement
Entrepreneurial background as the founder of an open-source platform
Strong focus on software craftsmanship, community building, and mentoring
concerns: Lacks Director-level (Principal) strategic scope and leadership
AI experience is limited to recent tactical implementation rather than deep strategy
No evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI transformations
